title: UnitTest
subtitle: An object for organizing and running unit tests validated by assertions.

members.name: assertEquals
members.description: Fail the running test if a != b.

members.name: assertEqualsWithinDelta
members.description: Fail the running test if the expected value is not within delta of the actual value.

members.name: assertFalse
members.description: Fail the running test if a != false.

members.name: assertNil
members.description: Fail the running test if a != nil.

members.name: assertNotEquals
members.description: Fail the running test if a == b.

members.name: assertNotNil
members.description: Fail the running test if a == nil.

members.name: assertNotSame
members.description: Fail the running test if a != b.

members.name: assertRaisesException
members.description: Fail the running test if the code does not raise an Exception.

members.name: assertTrue
members.description: Fail the running test if a != true.

members.name: fail
members.description: Call to trigger a test failure with a given error message.

members.name: setUp
members.description: Method called prior to each test.
